description: Spyro: A Hero's Tail is a 3D platformer and collect-a-thon released in 2004 for the Xbox, Playstation 2 and GameCube.

0.0.1.description: Basic alpha release for the first realm. *Mostly* functional state
0.0.1.title: Dragon Kingdom

0.1.0.description:
Make sure to install the correct mod version via https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v0.1

- Light Gems, Dark Gems and Dragon Eggs are now randomized.
0.1.0.title: GameCube Alpha 1

0.1.1.description:
Changelog:
- Fixed goaling not working correctly
- Added options to toggle randomization of mini game rewards
- Added debug command to manually release a location
  - This is due to a bug in the game that very rarely not updates a dragon egg trigger in some mini games
0.1.1.title: GameCube Alpha 2

0.2.0.description:
- Added randomization of the Elders abilities
- Added YAML options to randomize ``Swim``, ``Charge`` and ``Glide``
  - ``Swim`` refers to being able to swim underwater, paddling on the surface is not affected
- Added starting breath YAML option
  - ``default`` grants Fire Breath, ``random`` grants a random one of the 4 breaths, and ``none`` removes your starting breath
- Added randomization of Junk chests (locked chests that contain gems or power ups)
- Added YAML option to enable all realm teleportation
  - Enabling this completely changes the logic in many regions (specifically about Double Jump)
- Added YAML option to enable the Skip Cutscene button
  - Has some minor visual glitches with the dialogue boxes, but works
- Added YAML option for alternate goal conditions for all 4 bosses
- Talking to a mini game NPC will now hint their item rewards

Download the AR Code via https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases
0.2.0.title: GameCube Alpha 3

0.2.1.description:
- Overhauled logic using RuleBuilder API
  - __Minimum version to run is now 0.6.7__
- Fixed several logic errors
- Fix item sync (hopefully)
- Skip cutscene for Mammoth and allow Gloomy Glacier access

Download AR_Code.txt via https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v0.2
0.2.1.title: GameCube Alpha 4

0.3.0.description:
- Added randomization of Moneybag's store
  - This adds Shockwave, Butterfly Jar, Sparx HP Upgrade, Double Gems and 52 Lockpicks to the item pool
  - Butterfly Jar will be re-added to the player on death
  - Double Gems is now permanent
- Added randomization of Boss Lair door requirement costs
  - Your goal boss will always be the most expensive of the 4 doors
  - Going up to the door will show how much it costs
  - A notification will be dispatched when you acquire enough dark gems to open the door
- Added randomization of the Light Gem door costs
  - Going up to the door will show how much it costs
  - A notification will be disatched when you acquire enough light gems to open the door
- All locked chests now logically require 52 lockpicks to open
  - They can still be opened without them, just they are less likely to have something useful inside
- Added 3 of every bomb type to the filler item pool if shop randomization is enabled
- Added YAML option to toggle mini game hinting
- Notifications now appear in-game for received items or death links
- Shop item costs now generate during generation instead of client-side
- Fixed Hunter disappearing from Dragon Village after encountering the Mammoth
- Renamed Lightning Breath to Electric Breath
- Renamed Extra Health Unit to Health Unit+
- Renamed Crocoville Swamp to Crocovile Swamp
- Removed filling in Gem Packs for other games

Download the AR_Code.txt via https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v0.3
0.3.0.title: GameCube Alpha 5

0.3.1.description:
- Fixed shop randomization when the setting is not enabled

Download the AR_Code.txt via <https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v0.3>
0.3.1.title: GameCube Alpha 6

0.3.2.description:
- Added YAML options for min and max dark gems
- Fixed obtaining breaths from killing bosses
- Fixed Trina showing up at spin poles and swim spots
- Fixed notification showing wrong light gem door
- Adjusted placement of notification text during mini games
- Added an item group for breaths
- Renamed Light Gem door locations to remove gem count
- Fixed Light Gem from boilers location names
- Fixed incorrect Light Gem door costs and notifications
- Fixed notifications being skipped
- Fixed the Gloomy Glacier entrance gate not opening when skipping the button cutscene
- Gem Packs now grant 1000 gems if Double Gems is active
- Gem Packs for other players are now correctly priced
- Fixed Shop Item 57 missing from the shop
- Fixed not obtaining the breath bombs

Download the AR_Code.txt via <https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v0.3>
0.3.2.title: GameCube Alpha 7

0.3.3.description:
- Added DeathLink support
- Added YAML option to toggle elevators being instant to Cloudy Domain, Sunken Ruins and Magma Falls
- Added YAML option to scout boss rewards
- Dropped lockpick items no longer function
- Locked Chests that originally contained junk items are now empty
- Gem Packs now have a randomized value
- Increased default shop prices to 500-5000
- Added icon to launcher

Download the AR_Code.txt via https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v0.3.3
0.3.3.title: GameCube Alpha 8

1.0.0.description:
- Added Firework randomization option
- Added realm access randomization options
- Added region Key rings
- Added Starting realm option
- Added cost randomization of Professor Mole's gadgets
- Added item and location groups to improve hints and exclusions
- Added in game map tracker (toggle on pause menu)
- Bosses can now be toggled to "easy" mode, massively increasing the damage they receive
- Full client rewrite
  - Reduced generation failure rate to ~10%
- Fixed logic error in Dark Mines at the laser turret room
- Fixed bosses breaking when teleporting out of the arena mid-fight

Download the AR_Code.txt via https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0

1.0.1.description:
- Fixed shop item patch causing client disconnect
- Fixed 4 frame notification appearing
- Fixed mismatched item count for key_rings and realm_access options
- Fixed non-key ring shop having mismatched item ids
- Fixed regression in realm access patch
- Fixed regression in breath rules
- Fixed critical error in locations.json

Download the AR_Code.txt via https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0

1.0.2.description:
*Last hotfix: 1:24pm PT*

- Fixed DeathLink not being received
- Fixed possible softlock with gadgets
- Removed RealmAccess(shuffled)
  - Caused too many issues to be worth the effort to keep
- Re-enabled MiscGoal(all)
- Disallowed starting outside Dragon Village if Movement and Shop randomization is disabled
  - At least one of Movement or Shop must be enabled to start outside Dragon Village

AR_Code.txt: https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0

1.0.3.description:
- Modified disconnection logic
  - In game will now correctly tell you the client is not connected if you disconnect the client
- Modified Double Gems logic
  - Backend modifications only, functionally exactly the same
- Fireworks will no longer appear on the tracker if they are not randomized
- Fixed Starting Realm Access check not being assigned an access card
- Fixed realm access cards not updating the in game tracker
- Fixed invalid location being scouted in the shop
- Fixed incorrect amount of shop locations
- Fixed mismatched gem pack count
- Receiving a death link no longer glitches the player if they are climbing a wall as Hunter or Blink

AR_Code.txt: https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0.3

1.0.4.description:
- Fixed logic error at FV: Light Gem beyond Light Gem Door
- Added new region to Dark Mine due to logic error
  - Besides the 4 early checks (2 locked chests, 2 beyond light gem door), Dark Mine now requires Charge
- Fixed incorrect index checking for light gem doors

AR_Code.txt: <https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0.3>

1.0.5.description:
- Modified YAML option comments to be more clear
- Update README to include extra notes about the mod
- Fixed infinite lock-pick bug

AR_Code.txt: https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0.3

1.0.6.description:
- Improved clarity of key rings
- Fixed Mecha-Red not being marked as reachable in the tracker
- Unicode support for shop items

AR_Code.txt: https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0.6

1.0.7.description:
- Fixed shop items for the 3rd time
- Fixed typo in notification

AR_Code.txt: https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0.6

1.0.9.description:
- Fixed bug with Moneybags' shop item 5
- Re-introduced min and max gadget cost options
- Added "shop items" as a location group
- Adjusted logic for 2 items in Coastal Remains
    - The light gem in Otto's pool now requires glide, and the dragon egg past the piranha pool no longer requires glide
- Expanded item groups
    - Added new groups Elder Abilities, Collectibles, Abilities, Filler, and Access Cards
    - Renamed "Breath" group to "Breaths" to be consistent

Changes courtesy of @seanstan95

AR_Code.txt: https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0.6

v1.0.10.description:
# v1.0.10: New Client Command & Red's Lab Fixes
*This release is not compatible with previously generated seeds due to the addition of a few things into the slot data, and adjustments in location logic which would clash with previous versions. It is, however, compatible with the most recent version of the game mod (AR codes), [linked here](https://github.com/BrinchEbsen/AHT_Archipelago/releases/tag/v1.0.6) for convenience.*

- Added new client command `/list_options` which lists all YAML options as well as the costs of things which were potentially randomized (such as gadget and light gem door costs). A lot of this info is already visible on the pause menu in the game mod but some of the info was not, so this is meant to complement that.
  - This required adding 4 new entries to the slot data, one each for the options to randomize minigame rewards.
- Fixed Mecha-Red location not having boss lair cost logic applied to it. This resulted in the Mecha-Red location being accessible in logic once Red's Lab in general is accessible.
- Fixed a minor logic issue with a Dragon Egg in Red's Lab which should require Fire Breath and did not.
- Fixed 2 locations in Red's Lab which had their names swapped.
v1.0.10.title: Spyro: A Hero's Tail: v1.0.10
